description_long: This is a large, multifunctional wooden desk and shelving unit with a light oak finish and white accent panels. The upper section features a combination of open shelves and closed cabinets, providing ample storage for books, files, or decorative items. The lower section includes a spacious work surface with a curved cutout for ergonomic seating, as well as a set of three drawers on one side and a closed cabinet on the other. Metal handles are visible on the drawers and cabinet doors, adding a modern touch. The unit stands on small feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its design is practical for use in offices, home workspaces, or public urban environments such as libraries or community centers.
description: A large, light oak and white desk with upper shelves, cabinets, drawers, and a spacious work surface. Features metal handles and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white accent panels, upper cabinets, and the main work surface with open space beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, the curved desk cutout, and the arrangement of drawers and cabinets.
description_view_2: Full frontal view displaying all open shelves, cabinet doors, and the complete desk surface layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood panel and the side profile of the desk and storage compartments.
